channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Poll: Even Trump voters reject his Jesus post
item.description: President Trump 's own voters overwhelmingly rejected his social media post depicting himself as Jesus — a rare break in today's tribal politics, a ne...

item.title: Doctors' growing AI deepfakes problem
item.description: AI is helping make doctors the unwitting stars of deepfake videos that hawk questionable products or spread misinformation, prompting calls from clini...

item.title: Assaults against U.S. Jews reach 46-year high
item.description: Data: Anti-Defamation League annual Audit of Antisemitic Incidents ; Chart: Russell Contreras/Axios Physical assaults against Jewish people in the U.S...

item.title: RFK Jr. out for revenge against skeptical senator
item.description: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and his MAHA movement are out for payback, setting their sights on unseating a fierce adversary — Republican Se...
